component.name: Mixtapes
component.summary: A modern, Linux-first YouTube Music player

description.p: Mixtapes is a YouTube Music player built with GTK4 and Libadwaita for Linux. Browse your library, search for music, create playlists, and enjoy seamless playback with MPRIS integration, responsive mobile-friendly design, and background playback.
Note: This software is in alpha stage. It is not affiliated with YouTube or Google.
Major feature update with library management, uploads, and performance improvements.

ul.li: Changed versioning scheme for Alpha releases to YYYY-MM-DD.p where p is the patch number
Stream URL caching for instant song replay and pre-caching of surrounding queue songs
Multi-select songs in playlists with bulk actions (add to playlist, remove, play selected)
Sort playlists by title, artist, album, or duration with ascending/descending toggle
Search within playlists now covers all tracks, not just loaded ones
Save and unsave albums and playlists to your library
Saved albums section in the library
Upload songs to YouTube Music
Uploaded music tab with albums, artists, and all-songs view
Delete individual uploaded songs and albums with confirmation
Start radio from any song, artist, or search result
Artist page now shows full videos list, playlists, featured on, and fans might also like sections
YouTube channel support (non-artist channels with playlists and videos)
Read more/show less for long descriptions on album, playlist, and artist pages
Copy link with toast notification across the app
Add to playlist from queue panel and expanded player
Playlist duration calculated from all tracks, not just loaded ones
Background playback - music continues when window is closed, reopen via MPRIS
Volume slider now matches system mixer percentage with bidirectional sync
Fixed volume feedback loop that could freeze the system
Fixed song activation playing wrong track due to expanded player carousel race condition
Fixed queue panel selection issues causing unintended track changes
Responsive cover art sizing with proper desktop and mobile dimensions
Consistent search result row heights
Custom playlist cover upload support fixed
